source.description:
This activity pack contains long running activities that enables to build orchestration process by chaining various RPA workflows through Orchestrator Queues and Start Job, as well as inject human tasks during workflow execution.
This pack contains activities that persists the workflow context in a central persistence store so that workflows can wait for long running activities to complete without blocking resources (Robots and Human).
Tasks created through this activity pack will be presented in Actions space for end users.

IMPORTANT : Certain new features added to this package version requires Orchestrator v2021.10 or above. Other pre-requisites would be Studio v2023.2 or above and UiPath.FormActivityLibrary 2.0.7 or above.
Installing it on versions lower than the recommended ones may create un-expected results during execution.
source.tags: UiPathActivities Persistence Actions Tasks ActionCenter OrchestrationProcess LongRunningWorkflows

activities.description: Creates a App Task. The returned Task object can be used in the 'Wait For App Task and Resume' activity to wait for the task to be completed.
Get App task objects based on the filter criteria provided

activities.displayName: Wait For App Task and Resume
activities.description: To be used in paired mode with 'Create App Task' activity by providing the task object as the input. Upon completion of a task, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT provided in the task data will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.
Provide additional context for a user through Task comments.
Assign one or more tasks created in this workflow to users by providing email address or username registered with Orchestrator
Activity to complete a task
Configure the timer on a task
Use this activity to Forward a task assigned to you to another user
Activity to fetch Task Data object for specific TaskId
Adds/removes labels to/from the specified task.

activities.displayName: Add Queue Item And Get Reference
activities.description: Add Orchestrator Queue Item with parameters (IN, IN/OUT and OUT) and fetch the corresponding Queue Item Object in-order to wait for the completion of Queue item processing at any point in the workflow. Up on completion of its processing, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.

activities.displayName: Wait For Queue Item And Resume
activities.description: To be used in paired mode with 'Add Queue Item and Get Reference' activity by providing the Queue item object as the input .Upon completion of this queue item, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT provided as part of the Queue item parameters will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.

Invoke an orchestrator job with arguments (IN, IN/OUT and OUT) and fetch the corresponding job object in-order to wait for this job completion at any point in the workflow. Upon completion of this job, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.

To be used in paired mode with 'Start Job and Get Reference' activity by providing the Job object as the input. Upon completion of this job, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT provided as part of the Job arguments will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.
Creates a form task. The returned Task object can be used in the 'Wait For Form Task and Resume' activity to wait for the task to be completed.
Get Form task objects based on the filter criteria provided

activities.displayName: Wait for Form Task and Resume
activities.description: To be used in paired mode with 'Create Form Task' activity by providing the task object as the input. Upon completion of a task, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT provided in the task data will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.
Create and assign tasks to human users for business approvals, set task timers and pause workflows till task completion
Creates an external task. The returned Task object can be used in the 'Wait For External Task and Resume' activity to wait for the task to be completed.

activities.displayName: Wait For External Task and Resume
activities.description: To be used in paired mode with 'Create External Task' activity by providing the task object as the input. Upon completion of a task, arguments of type IN/OUT and OUT provided in the task data will be assigned back to the mapped workflow variables.
Activity to build workflows that can be suspended for a period of time that auto resumes based on a timer
